temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A blonde woman, wearing a patterned blouse and a cross necklace, speaks with a concerned expression. She gestures with her hands as she talks, with a VCR and an old CRT television visible behind her. (Storyline: The scene opens with a woman, likely a therapist or counselor, questioning someone off-screen about a potential stalker, setting a tense and serious mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Concerned, questioning. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:02-00:05) The scene cuts to a wide shot of a living room. A man with a sling on his arm sits on the left, looking down. In the middle, a man stands behind a couch, looking sternly at the group. On the couch, a man in a blue shirt looks up, and a woman in a white shirt looks down with a somber expression. (Storyline: The group is introduced in their living room, reacting to the off-screen conversation. The man with the sling and the standing man appear to be the focus of the tension.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Annoyed, sarcastic. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
